notes: Use PROTON_FORCE_LARGE_ADDRESS_AWARE=1 tweak to avoid Access Violation. Game have shadow lags and mid perfomance ~30fps and ~45fps if set water settings to normal.
title: SpellForce 2 - Anniversary Edition

notes: In general, it works perfectly - I have just experienced some minor graphic bugs like overlapping textures, but it is nothing that affects the gameplay.
title: SpellForce 2 - Anniversary Edition

notes:
The game would not start for me because the "config.xml" file contained the wrong screen resolution. I disabled "Steam Cloud sync" and edited the "config.xml" file in "/path to your /SteamLibrary/steamapps/compatdata/39550/pfx/drive_c/users/steamuser/My Documents/SpellForce2/" folder to the exact resolution of my desktop. In my case it is screenheight="1050" screenwidth="1680".

The game runs fine from within Steam now.
title: SpellForce 2 - Anniversary Edition
